languages.text: "Возможно, экспозиция несколько... скудна без дополнительных экспонатов. Впрочем, как я мог разместить реликвию-ровесницу среди менее темпорально-значимых трофеев?"

traits.locale_text: "Возможно, экспозиция несколько... скудна без дополнительных экспонатов. Впрочем, как я мог разместить реликвию-ровесницу среди менее темпорально-значимых трофеев?"

languages.text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"
languages.original_text: "Возможно, экспозиция несколько... скудна без дополнительных экспонатов. Впрочем, как я мог разместить реликвию-ровесницу среди менее темпорально-значимых трофеев?"

traits.locale_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"
"Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"
"Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

languages.text: “在没有其他展品搭配的情况下，这个陈列确实显得有些……寒酸。不过，我又怎么能把跟自己同时代的圣物，摆在那些时间价值远不如它的战利品旁边呢？”
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: “在没有其他展品搭配的情况下，这个陈列确实显得有些……寒酸。不过，我又怎么能把跟自己同时代的圣物，摆在那些时间价值远不如它的战利品旁边呢？”

languages.text: «Es posible que la exposición sea un poco... escasa sin otras piezas. Sin embargo, ¿cómo iba a colocar una reliquia de mi propia edad entre otros trofeos con menos significado temporal?».
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: «Es posible que la exposición sea un poco... escasa sin otras piezas. Sin embargo, ¿cómo iba a colocar una reliquia de mi propia edad entre otros trofeos con menos significado temporal?».

languages.text: « Cette section semble un peu vide, je l'admets. Cependant, comment aurais-je pu placer une relique de mon propre cru au beau milieu de trophées de moindre importance ? »
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: « Cette section semble un peu vide, je l'admets. Cependant, comment aurais-je pu placer une relique de mon propre cru au beau milieu de trophées de moindre importance ? »

languages.text: "Belki de sergi, ilave eserler olmayınca... Seyrek kalıyordur. Ancak zamansal olarak daha önemsiz olan ganimetlerin arasına kendi dönemimden bir yadigârı nasıl koyabilirim?"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: "Belki de sergi, ilave eserler olmayınca... Seyrek kalıyordur. Ancak zamansal olarak daha önemsiz olan ganimetlerin arasına kendi dönemimden bir yadigârı nasıl koyabilirim?"

languages.text: "Mag sein, dass die Ausstellung ohne weitere Exponate ein wenig ... mager ist. Aber wie hätte ich ein Relikt meines eigenen Jahrgangs unter zeitlich weniger bedeutsamen Trophäen platzieren können?"
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: "Mag sein, dass die Ausstellung ohne weitere Exponate ein wenig ... mager ist. Aber wie hätte ich ein Relikt meines eigenen Jahrgangs unter zeitlich weniger bedeutsamen Trophäen platzieren können?"

languages.text: 「展示は、追加の展示品がないと、かなり…寂しいかもしれません。しかし、私の時代の遺物と、時代的に重要度の低いトロフィーを、どのように配置すればよかったのでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "Perhaps the display is rather... sparse without additional exhibits. However, how could I have placed a relic of my own vintage among less temporally significant trophies?"

traits.locale_text: 「展示は、追加の展示品がないと、かなり…寂しいかもしれません。しかし、私の時代の遺物と、時代的に重要度の低いトロフィーを、どのように配置すればよかったのでしょうか？」
